The SAS role for GEMO. Its responses live in the '0-SAS' column. Must NEVER be merged with 'Maître d'Oeuvre EXE'.

effect: Status interpretation must use the BC vocabulary for SOCOTEC rows. Reflected in STATUS_LABELS_BY_CANONICAL: {s1:FAV, s2:SUS, s3:DEF}.
notes: SUS overlaps with the standard vocab semantically; both mean suspended/with reservations.

rule_value: Removes SAS RAPPEL responses dated before 2026

effect: Only HIGH and MEDIUM consultant matches are persisted to report_memory.db. LOW-confidence matches stay in consultant_match_report.xlsx for review.
Secondary consultants own a doc only within 10 days of the latest primary answer. Past that window MOEX takes over.
Documents whose _visa_global is in this set are CLOSED in Focus mode (resolved set in focus_filter).

effect: Patch F fuzzy reconciliation: scores >=0.85 auto-reconcile; 0.70-0.85 go to REVIEW_REQUIRED.
